title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people eating in a restaurant. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Two friends are eating lunch in a small restaurant. They are sitting at a table with plates of food and glasses of water. A waiter is standing nearby and there are other tables behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone walking a dog. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young woman is walking a large dog in a park. She is holding the dog's lead and smiling. There is grass, a path, trees and a cyclist in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
